3223600.name: CROWDED. FOLLOWED. Demo
3223600.description: You have the briefcase, and now something relentless is hunting you. Blending into the crowd, it hides in plain sight, waiting to strike. In this short demo, get a taste of the full experience as you navigate tense environments like subways and crowded streets, using strategy to keep your distance. Experience the core mechanics—dashing through claustrophobic crowds, managing your stamina with a shaky inhaler, and keeping a constant eye on the ever-shifting threat. Trust no one—it could be anyone. Can you survive the chase?
